nasb.text: So Moses went down from the mountain to the people and consecrated the people, and they washed their garments.

esv.text: So Moses went down from the mountain to the people and consecrated the people; and they washed their garments.

cnv.text: 摩西從山上下來到人民那裡去，使人民分別為聖，他們就把自己的衣服洗淨了。

ccb.text: 于是，摩西下山回到百姓那里，吩咐他们各人洁净自己，洗净衣服。
